message:
fix: bump frankensqlite to ff6a114b (1GB page buffer default)

The previous frankensqlite rev had a hardcoded 256MB page buffer pool
ceiling that caused OOM on databases exceeding ~2GB during normal
B-tree operations. The new rev increases the default to 1GB and makes
it configurable via FSQLITE_PAGE_BUFFER_MAX.

Fixes #157

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ which = "*"
 shell-words = "*"
 dotenvy = "*"
 notify = "*"
-frankensqlite = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", rev = "e3f57c9a", package = "fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }
+frankensqlite = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", rev = "ff6a114b", package = "fsqlite", features = ["fts5"] }
 rayon = "*"
 crossbeam-channel = "*"
 parking_lot = "*"
@@ -133,7 +133,7 @@ rand = "0.10"
 rand_chacha = "0.10"
 # frankensqlite compat gate tests (bead 3vvqa) — fsqlite-types needed for SqliteValue
 # enum variants in test assertions. The main fsqlite dep is available as `frankensqlite`.
-fsqlite-types = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", rev = "e3f57c9a", package = "fsqlite-types" }
+fsqlite-types = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite", rev = "ff6a114b", package = "fsqlite-types" }
 
 [[bin]]
 name = "cass"
